recommendations.title: Diary of a Fleeting Affair
recommendations.overview: A single mother and a married man enter into an affair with the understanding that their relationship is purely sexual. Though they agree the relationship has no future, they find themselves increasingly drawn into each other's company.

recommendations.title: Caprice
recommendations.overview: An average guy meets an actress who is more beautiful than he could ever imagine. But then a pesky girl materializes to make his life a living hell. His perfect girlfriend now thinks that he is involved with this Caprice.

recommendations.title: Love Affair(s)
recommendations.overview: Vacations in the French countryside. Daphne, three months pregnant, finds herself alone to welcome Maxime, her boyfriend François’ cousin. François had to leave in a hurry for Paris to cover for a sick colleague. For four days, while waiting for hi

recommendations.title: Three Friends
recommendations.overview: Joan is no longer in love with Victor, but it pains her to feel she is being dishonest with him. Alice, her best friend, reassures her: She herself doesn’t feel passionate about her partner Eric and yet their relationship is smooth sailing. She has n

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
recommendations.overview: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.

recommendations.title: Rocco and His Brothers
recommendations.overview: When a impoverished widow’s family moves to the big city, two of her five sons become romantic rivals with deadly results.

recommendations.title: Close to the Horizon
recommendations.overview: Jessica knows exactly what her life is supposed to look like and where it takes her. But then she meets Danny. He has a complicated past and could confuse all their plans. Jessica has to decide.

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Liaisons
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, Marquise de Merteuil asks her ex-lover Vicomte de Valmont to seduce the future wife of another ex-lover of hers in return for one last night with her. Yet things don’t go as planned.
